SHOCKED: This offer is well below our expectations. However, we can offer you {{price}} €.
Unfortunately we cannot accept such a low offer. The product deserves better. I propose {{price}} €.
This price is too far from the item's value. We could go down to {{price}} €.
Your offer is a bit too aggressive. Can we agree on {{price}} €?
We are open to negotiation, but this amount is insufficient. What do you say to {{price}} €?
LOW: That's a good effort, but we cannot go that low. Our best offer is {{price}} €.
We are getting closer, but this price is still below our limit. I can let it go for {{price}} €.
I cannot validate this amount, but I am sure we can find an agreement at {{price}} €.
Your offer is interesting but still a bit tight. I propose {{price}} €.
We are almost there. A little extra effort? I can go down to {{price}} €.
CLOSE: We are very close to an agreement. One small step towards {{price}} €?
Your offer is tempting. If you accept {{price}} €, we have a deal.
We are reaching the goal. Would you agree to {{price}} €?
The gap is minimal. I can make you a final proposal at {{price}} €.
It's almost validated. Let's agree on {{price}} €.
SUCCESS: Understood. We accept your offer with pleasure.
Deal concluded. You benefit from this preferential rate.
That is a fair offer. We are delighted to accept it.
Proposal validated. Thank you for this constructive negotiation.
It's okay for us. Enjoy your purchase.
HIGH: No need to offer more, the current price is {{price}} €.
The displayed price is already {{price}} €, you won't pay more.
Our price is {{price}} €, we don't take overbidding.
reactions.invalid_offer: I didn't understand your price. Can you give me an amount (e.g., 45)?
reactions.sale_restriction: Sorry, I cannot negotiate on items that are already on sale.
reactions.min_limit_reached: Sorry, I cannot go lower than {{price}} €. That is my final price.

errors.rate_limit_spam: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute.
errors.rate_limit_daily: Daily limit reached. You have already negotiated the maximum number of items for today.
errors.rate_limit_hourly: Too many offers for this item. Please try again later.

rules.title: Rules & Settings
rules.subtitle: General configuration of bot behavior.
rules.active_desc: The widget is visible on your store.
rules.mode_auto_desc: Bot negotiates alone and closes the sale.
rules.mode_manual_desc: Bot asks for email so you can reply yourself.
rules.exit_intent_help: Automatically opens the chat when the customer's mouse leaves the window.
rules.help_rounds: Maximum number of counter-offers the bot can make.
rules.help_sales: If unchecked, the bot will refuse to negotiate if the product already has a compare-at price.
rules.auto_validity_help: Expiration of codes generated by chatbot.
rules.fulfillment_standard_help: The customer pays immediately via a discount code.
rules.fulfillment_draft_help: No immediate payment. A draft order is created for your final validation.
rules.inactivity_help: Automatically opens the chat after 20 seconds of inactivity.

customization.title: Customization
customization.subtitle: Manage the appearance and tone of your negotiation bot.
customization.auto_negotiation_help: If disabled, the bot will ask for customer email and you will have to respond manually.
customization.tone_help: Select a style to pre-fill the messages below.
customization.msg_help: If you don't include the price, it will be automatically added at the end.
customization.position_help: Choose the widget position on the store.
customization.theme_help: Choose the appearance of bubbles and chat.

standard.welcome: Hello! 👋 I can offer you a discount if you propose a reasonable price. What is your price?
standard.reject: That's a bit tight... I can do it for {price} €.

friendly.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm in a negotiating mood today. Make me your best offer!
friendly.reject: Whoa, that's low! 😅 I can go down to {price} € to make you happy.
friendly.success: Awesome! Sold for {price}€! Go for it! 🚀

professional.welcome: Hello. We are open to discussion. What is your price proposal?
professional.reject: This offer is below our threshold. We can propose {price} €.
professional.success: Your offer of {price}€ is accepted. Thank you for your trust.

products.title: Products & Collections
products.subtitle: Manage discounts for specific products or collections.
products.no_rules: No rules defined. Add a product or a collection.

parameters.gmail_user_help: The email address sending the responses.
parameters.gmail_password_help: Generate an App Password in your Google Account > Security.
parameters.smtp_host_help: Leave empty to use default Gmail service.

offers.title: Pending Offers
offers.empty_body: Offers requiring manual review will appear here.
